description: Wild Blood Patch 2 (27 November 2023) — Season Winner Statues, Awakened Item Scaling Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Armors, Helmets, Capes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season Winner Statues Added
sections.description: New statues in Conquerors' Hall for last season's winners: Albion East Season 2: Winter; Albion West Season 20: Escalation.
sections.searchable_text: Season Winner Statues Conquerors Hall Albion East Season 2 Winter Albion West Season 20 Escalation

sections.heading: Awakened Item Scaling Changes
sections.description: Hellgates and Corrupted Dungeons now scale the power of Awakened Item Traits down to match the IP scaling in each location.
items: 2v2 Hellgates: 100% → 20%
5v5 and 10v10 Hellgates: 100% → 35%
Stalker Corrupted Dungeons: 100% → 20%
Slayer Corrupted Dungeons: 100% → 50%
The Item Power trait is not affected (already subject to IP scaling)
The Mob Fame trait is not affected (does not provide combat advantage)
Traits that scale with Item Power will be scaled back twice — intentional to scale bonus Traits relative to power already allowed in the area
sections.searchable_text: Awakened Item Scaling Hellgates Corrupted Dungeons IP scaling 2v2 100% 20% 5v5 10v10 35% Stalker 20% Slayer 50% Item Power Mob Fame bonus Traits

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Farm Animals now display their favorite food as overhead icons when hungry

Controller: Target direction of spells that can change target while casting can now be adjusted via right stick; added custom navigation, preview window, and quick actions to Destiny Board; right stick scrolling now only scrolls parent window of selected element
Mobile: Added proximity tooltips to Wisps; targeting improvements for skill shots and ground spells; Claim Rewards UI now scales up larger for smaller devices
Adventurer Vanity Skins (Rogue, Knight, Mage) are now available for Gold via Appearance UI
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Farm Animals favorite food icons hungry Controller right stick target direction Destiny Board custom navigation scrolling Mobile Wisps tooltips skill shots Claim Rewards Adventurer Vanity Skins Rogue Knight Mage Gold Appearance

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue with loot protection where PvP-flagged players could temporarily lock players out of their loot in red and yellow zones
Fixed issue where Power Cores, Energy Crystals, and Wisps could move into unreachable areas
Fixed issue where skillshots sometimes cast in wrong direction when rooted
Fixed issue where Runestone Fragments would stay alive longer than intended after the Runestone Golem was already dead
Runestone Golem no longer re-casts invincible state on subsequent encounters if health threshold was reached in a previous encounter
Fixed issue where the Cook could create fishing bait at a higher tier than its own
Some Morgana Cultists that didn't use their summon imp spell will now do so again
Fixed issue where players could walk around and switch windows with Gold Market UI open
Fixed issue where Hellfire and Sticky Potions thrown by multiple non-allied enemies could stack
Other faction enemies (Undead, Keeper, Morgana) no longer appear in Tier 3 Heretic Randomized Dungeons
Fixed issue where Farming Territories did not give their yield bonus to crops
Initial heal of Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff) now also heals the caster
Fixed issue where thrown snowballs were sometimes invisible
Multiple Controller fixes
[Mobile] Fixed issue where 'Changelog' notification showed in every session even after viewing
Additional minor graphical, animation, audio, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
